case_title: HANDLERY HOTELS, INC. VS DESAI, JAY MR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,698.19 FILED BY HANDLERY HOTELS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DESAI, JAY MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
